name: Coney Island Hot Dog Sauce#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground round in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring to crumble the meat. Drain excess fat.
2. Add water and remaining ingredients to the skillet. Stir well to combine.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Yield: about 3 cups
